home.lede: COSI is a research lab led by Professor Stefano A. Bini, MD. We use machine learning, population-scale clinical data, biomechanical simulation, and surgical robotics to change how hip and knee surgery is studied, planned, and performed.
home.bone_caption: Derived from a machine-learning segmentation of an MRI hip scan.
home.manifesto1: Surgical robots log every cut and every gap. Record networks hold the histories of tens of millions of patients. A tendon repair can be simulated before the incision is made.
